/Applications/ArmGNUToolchain/15.2.rel1/arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv5-sp-d16 -Wall -Wextra -g3 -O0 --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=PRAC_STM32.map,--cref -Wl,--gc-sections -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv5-sp-d16 -T/Volumes/JesperWork/workspace/STM32_Work/prac_stm32/Src/bsp/ldscript/STM32H563ZITX_FLASH.ld CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/ap/ap.c.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/bsp/bsp.c.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/bsp/startup/startup_stm32h563zitx.s.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/bsp/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/bsp/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/hw/hw.c.obj CMakeFiles/PRAC_STM32.elf.dir/Src/main.c.obj -o PRAC_STM32.elf
